overall.description: First-person walk through a rainy cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit covered walkways, open plazas, and busy intersections with futuristic vehicles. The footage appears to be from a video game with cinematic quality and heavy atmospheric rain effects.

green and orange neon tube lights along the ceiling structure
red neon open sign visible through glass window
overhead concrete structure providing shelter from rain

segments.scene_description: Walking through a covered pedestrian corridor with concrete walls and green neon overhead lighting. The area is sheltered from the rain with sparse pedestrians carrying umbrellas passing by. Storefronts with neon signs line the right side as the walkway leads toward an opening.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with stairs and neon signage

events.description: entering open plaza from covered walkway
shift from green neon to dominant pink neon lighting

entered.detail: large pink and blue neon sign reading Jackie and Coke on building wall
wooden or metal staircase leading to upper level of building
illuminated advertising screens showing various content

segments.scene_description: Entering an open plaza area dominated by a large pink Jackie and Coke neon sign on the left wall. The space features exterior stairs and multiple levels with scattered pedestrians walking through the rain. The lighting shifts from green to vibrant pink and blue neon as the scene opens up.

events.description: transition from pink neon to broader street lighting

agents.ego_description: walking along building facade approaching intersection

orange neon sign for Brooklyn Bar visible ahead

segments.scene_description: Walking along a sidewalk past glass storefronts with heart-shaped neon decorations and the Brooklyn Bar sign ahead. The camera approaches a large intersection with increasing ambient light from street lamps. The environment transitions from enclosed plaza to open street with the crosswalk visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: large urban intersection with crosswalk and digital billboards

events.description: beginning to cross wide intersection with yellow striped crosswalk

agents.ego_description: crossing wide intersection with yellow stripes while avoiding traffic

notable_agents.action: futuristic black car driving through intersection

entered.detail: large vertical digital screen with red advertisement and Japanese text
elevated pedestrian bridge connecting buildings across the street
tall building with multiple illuminated signs and glass facade

segments.scene_description: Crossing a wide intersection marked by bold yellow striped crosswalk lines while rain creates reflections on the wet asphalt. Large digital billboards and an overhead pedestrian bridge dominate the skyline between futuristic skyscrapers. Vehicles pass through the intersection as the camera moves from one side to the other.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner with traffic light and waiting area

events.description: waiting at corner as traffic passes through intersection
teal sports car stops at crosswalk in front of camera

agents.ego_description: waiting at street corner for traffic to clear before continuing

notable_agents.action: teal sports car stopped at crosswalk waiting for pedestrian

entered.detail: traffic signal pole with red light illuminated

segments.scene_description: Waiting at the street corner near a traffic light pole as a teal sports car stops at the crosswalk. The scene shows the opposite side of the intersection with buildings featuring large digital advertisements. The camera pauses at the corner observing the moderate traffic flow on the rain-slicked streets.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered, green-lit corridor into a vibrant, rain-soaked urban plaza and finally toward a wide city intersection. It begins within a covered pedestrian walkway defined by concrete walls and green neon overhead lighting, passing sparse pedestrians and glowing storefronts. As the camera moves forward, the scene opens into an expansive plaza where the lighting shifts to vibrant pink and blue, dominated by a large Jackie and Coke neon sign and multi-level stairs. The path then leads along a sidewalk past glass storefronts adorned with heart-shaped neon decorations and the Brooklyn Bar sign. Finally, the environment transitions from the enclosed plaza to an open street, moving toward a distant crosswalk illuminated by the increasing ambient light of street lamps.

The shot follows a continuous first-person movement across a rain-slicked urban intersection that transitions from a wide crossing into a stationary observation of the city's traffic. It begins by traversing bold yellow striped crosswalks, where the wet asphalt reflects the glow of towering digital billboards and an overhead pedestrian bridge. As the camera reaches the far side of the intersection, the perspective shifts from motion to a pause at a street corner beside a traffic light pole. The scene then settles into a steady gaze across the rain-washed street, observing a teal sports car idling at the crosswalk against a backdrop of luminous advertisements and flowing futuristic traffic.
